title: Claude Mythos explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses Anthropic's Claude Mythos as a reasoning frontier model marking a significant leap in capability similar to o1. The video examines concerns about private token access restrictions and their implications for AI adoption and equity as intelligence advances.
